revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:11]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:15世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 15 في اليابان]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 15th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۱۵ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:15-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ku:Category:Avabûnên sedsala 15an li Japonê]] [[uk:Category:Засновані в Японії в XV столітті]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں پندرہویں صدی کی تاسیسات]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Takahashi Inari Shrine]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{各世紀日本の設立}} {{translated page|ja|Category:15世紀の日本の設立|version=87415168}} {{wikidata link|Q25337928}} <!--interwikis--> [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 15 في اليابان]] [[co:commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 15th century]] [[en:Category:15th-century establishments in Japan]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۱۵ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:15-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ja:Category:15世紀の日本の設立]] [[ku:Category:Avabûnên sedsala 15an li Japonê]] [[uk:Category:Засновані в Японії в XV столітті]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں پندرہویں صدی کی تاسیسات]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Takahashi Inari Shrine]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=15th-century_establishments_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
